summary: Parlor is a real-time AI model server for audio/video processing with some community activity, but it faces significant challenges in terms of novelty, system requirements, and ease of use. github.description: On-device, real-time multimodal AI. Have natural voice and vision conversations with an AI that runs entirely on your machine. Powered by Gemma 4 E2B and Kokoro.
